findingVerification.notes: The benchmark warden.toml explicitly sets defaults.verification.enabled = true.

traceCapture.notes: Run used --traces on all shards. Per-chunk trace metadata is preserved in traceSummaries and the raw JSONL artifacts.

notes: Full benchmark result stitched from one Warden run per corpus SHA. Each shard analyzes every unique corpus path for that SHA, not the whole Sentry repository. This run used --runtime claude --model claude-sonnet-4-6 --traces with no explicit --effort; Warden's Claude runtime applied its high adaptive-thinking default. Warden post-analysis verification was enabled by benchmark config. The raw JSONL artifacts contain per-chunk trace metadata and verifier usage, but remain withheld pending sensitive-data review.

scoring.notes: Agent-verified semantic matches. A finding counts when it identifies the same bug in roughly the same location as an existing corpus finding. Same-file findings about different bugs do not count.
